summary: Iteration 6 testing: 3 new features — playoff auto-advance, rating-history endpoint + UI chart, league↔season FK. Backend 11/11 passed. Frontend verified end-to-end: rating chart renders with all 6 data-testids, pickleball tab shows empty-state copy, /leagues filter-season dropdown present, admin Create League Season dropdown present with helper text.

minor.issue: Exposes raw MongoDB `_id` field (not `id`) — inconsistent with /api/auth/login which correctly returns `id`. User's own record so no data leak, but every frontend consumer must special-case this. Should exclude `_id` via projection and map to `id` like the other endpoints.

action_items: (Low) Normalise /api/auth/me to return `id` instead of `_id` for frontend consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: match_routes._maybe_advance_playoffs: correctly idempotent (checks existing next-round matches before inserting) and emits next_round_created in the score response. Nice.
match_routes._update_ratings: rating_history snapshots are written only for tennis/pickleball — cricket correctly excluded. Snapshots include opponent_name/result/league_id/sport for chart rendering.
user_routes: GET /api/users/me/rating-history is correctly placed BEFORE GET /api/users/{user_id} so the literal `me` doesn't get captured as user_id — good route precedence.
RatingHistoryChart.jsx: `user?.[`${sport}_rating`] !== undefined` filter for eligible sports is correct — cricket is naturally excluded. Uses `withCredentials: true` for the cookie-based auth.
league_routes: added season_id query param; get_leagues is also phase-gated. Clean.
Phase 1 gating is now consistent: POST /api/leagues and POST /api/seasons both 400 on inactive sports — last iteration's minor issue is resolved.
Minor: /api/auth/me returns `_id` instead of `id` — inconsistent with other endpoints that project it out.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 6 rating-history testids, /leagues filter-season, and admin create-league-season verified)

seed_data_creation: Fresh users ui1_<rand>@e.com / ui2_<rand>@e.com with Test@123 via /api/auth/register for rating-history UI test. Fresh TEST_UISeason_<rand> + TEST_UILeague_<rand> linked via season_id. Playoff test creates 4 fresh players and an 8-player tennis league.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth endpoints return cookies (access_token/refresh_token). The Auth.jsx LOGIN form does NOT have data-testids — use input[type=email], input[type=password], button[type=submit] selectors. After UI login, navigate to /dashboard directly (redirect lands on /dashboard automatically). LeagueCreate model REQUIRES `format` field (singles/doubles/mixed/T20/T10). /api/auth/me currently returns `_id` not `id` — use /api/auth/login response for the id instead.
rca of the issue: N/A — all 3 new features work end-to-end. Only a minor /api/auth/me inconsistency noted.
